mapper.select: SELECT open FROM dain_place WHERE code = #{placeCode};
SELECT ds.token, dp.code AS place_code, ds.expiry_at, du.level FROM admin_session ds JOIN dain_place dp ON ds.place_id = dp.id JOIN admin_user du ON du.id = ds.user_id WHERE token = #{clientToken}

SELECT au.id AS user_id, au.place_id, dp.code AS place_code, au.user, au.level FROM admin_user au JOIN dain_place dp ON au.place_id = dp.id WHERE dp.code = #{placeCode} AND au.user = #{user} AND au.password = #{password} AND au.used = true;
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM admin_session WHERE expiry_at < NOW() - INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE
